queries.name: TPC-H Q1: Pricing Summary
queries.sql:
SELECT
  l_returnflag,
  l_linestatus,
  SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
  SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
  AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
  AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
  AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
  COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM lineitem
WHERE l_shipdate <= DATE '1998-12-01' - INTERVAL '90' DAY
GROUP BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY l_returnflag, l_linestatus;
queries.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate <= '1998-09-02'
group by l_returnflag, l_linestatus
agg
  sum(l_quantity) as sum_qty,
  sum(l_extendedprice) as sum_base_price,
  sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as sum_disc_price,
  sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) as sum_charge,
  avg(l_quantity) as avg_qty,
  avg(l_extendedprice) as avg_price,
  avg(l_discount) as avg_disc,
  count(*) as count_order
order by l_returnflag, l_linestatus
queries.description: Pricing summary report with aggregations

queries.name: TPC-H Q2: Minimum Cost Supplier
queries.sql:
select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment
from partsupp
join supplier on s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
join region on n_regionkey = r_regionkey
join part on p_partkey = ps_partkey
where p_size = 15
  and p_type like '%BRASS'
  and r_name = 'EUROPE'
  and ps_supplycost = (
    select min(ps_supplycost)
    from partsupp
    join supplier on s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
    join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
    join region on n_regionkey = r_regionkey
    where p_partkey = ps_partkey
      and r_name = 'EUROPE'
  )
order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey
limit 100
queries.description: Correlated subquery to find min-cost supplier per part

queries.name: TPC-H Q3: Shipping Priority
queries.sql:
SELECT
  l_orderkey,
  SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue,
  o_orderdate,
  o_shippriority
FROM customer
JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
JOIN lineitem ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
WHERE c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
  AND o_orderdate < DATE '1995-03-15'
  AND l_shipdate > DATE '1995-03-15'
GROUP BY l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
ORDER BY revenue DESC, o_orderdate
LIMIT 10;
queries.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
where
  c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
  and o_orderdate < '1995-03-15'
  and l_shipdate > '1995-03-15'
group by l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority
agg sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
order by revenue desc, o_orderdate
limit 10
queries.description: Shipping priority query with 3-way join

queries.name: TPC-H Q4: Order Priority Checking
queries.sql:
select  o_orderpriority, count(*) as order_count
from    orders
where   o_orderdate >= date '1993-07-01'
	and o_orderdate < date '1993-07-01' + interval '3' month
	and exists (
		select  *
		from    lineitem
		where   l_orderkey = o_orderkey
		and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
	)
group by
	o_orderpriority
order by
	o_orderpriority
queries.description: EXISTS subquery for order priority analysis

queries.name: TPC-H Q5: Local Supplier Volume
queries.sql:
select n_name, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
join supplier on l_suppkey = s_suppkey and c_nationkey = s_nationkey
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
join region on n_regionkey = r_regionkey
where r_name = 'ASIA'
  and o_orderdate >= date '1994-01-01'
  and o_orderdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year
group by n_name
order by revenue desc
queries.description: 6-table join for local supplier revenue

queries.name: TPC-H Q6: Forecasting Revenue Change
queries.sql:
select  sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue
from    lineitem
where   l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'
	and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year
	and l_discount between .06 - 0.01 and .06 + 0.01
	and l_quantity < 24
queries.description: Single-table aggregation with date range filter

queries.name: TPC-H Q7: Volume Shipping
queries.sql:
SELECT
  supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
  SELECT
    n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
    n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
    l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
  FROM supplier
  JOIN lineitem ON s_suppkey = l_suppkey
  JOIN orders ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
  JOIN customer ON c_custkey = o_custkey
  JOIN nation n1 ON s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
  JOIN nation n2 ON c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
  WHERE (
    (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' AND n2.n_name = 'GERMANY')
    OR (n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' AND n2.n_name = 'FRANCE')
  )
  AND l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
queries.wvlet:
from supplier
join lineitem on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
join orders on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
join customer on c_custkey = o_custkey
join nation as n1 on s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
join nation as n2 on c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
where
  ((n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'GERMANY')
   or (n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE'))
  and l_shipdate between '1995-01-01' and '1996-12-31'
select
  n1.n_name as supp_nation,
  n2.n_name as cust_nation,
  extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year,
  l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume
group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
agg sum(volume) as revenue
order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
queries.description: Volume shipping between nations (nested subquery → flat)

queries.name: TPC-H Q8: National Market Share
queries.sql:
select o_year, sum(case
    when nation = 'BRAZIL' then volume
    else 0
  end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share
from (
  select year(o_orderdate) as o_year,
    l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume,
    n2.n_name as nation
  from part
  join lineitem on p_partkey = l_partkey
  join supplier on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
  join orders on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
  join customer on o_custkey = c_custkey
  join nation n1 on c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
  join region on n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey
  join nation n2 on s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
  where r_name = 'AMERICA'
    and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31'
    and p_type = 'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL'
) as all_nations
group by o_year
order by o_year
queries.description: 8-table join with CASE for market share calculation

queries.name: TPC-H Q9: Product Type Profit
queries.sql:
select nation, o_year, sum(amount) as sum_profit
from (
  select n_name as nation, year(o_orderdate) as o_year,
    l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) - ps_supplycost * l_quantity as amount
  from lineitem
  join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
  join supplier on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
  join partsupp on ps_suppkey = l_suppkey and ps_partkey = l_partkey
  join orders on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
  join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
  where p_name like '%green%'
) as profit
group by nation, o_year
order by nation, o_year desc
queries.description: 6-table join subquery for profit by nation/year

queries.name: TPC-H Q10: Returned Item Reporting
queries.sql:
select c_custkey, c_name, sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue,
  c_acctbal, n_name, c_address, c_phone, c_comment
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
join nation on c_nationkey = n_nationkey
where o_orderdate >= date '1993-10-01'
  and o_orderdate < date '1993-10-01' + interval '3' month
  and l_returnflag = 'R'
group by c_custkey, c_name, c_acctbal, c_phone, n_name, c_address, c_comment
order by revenue desc
limit 20
queries.description: 4-table join for returned item revenue

queries.name: TPC-H Q11: Important Stock
queries.sql:
SELECT
  ps_partkey,
  SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS value
FROM partsupp
JOIN supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
WHERE n_name = 'GERMANY'
GROUP BY ps_partkey
HAVING SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) > (
  SELECT SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) * 0.0001
  FROM partsupp
  JOIN supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
  WHERE n_name = 'GERMANY'
)
ORDER BY value DESC;
queries.wvlet:
let german_supply =
  from partsupp
  join supplier on ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
  where n_name = 'GERMANY'

from german_supply
group by ps_partkey
agg sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) as value
where value > (
  from german_supply
  agg sum(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) * 0.0001
)
order by value desc
queries.description: Important stock identification (duplicated subquery → CTE)

queries.name: TPC-H Q12: Shipping Modes & Order Priority
queries.sql:
select l_shipmode,
  sum(case
    when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT'
      or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH'
      then 1
    else 0
  end) as high_line_count,
  sum(case
    when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT'
      and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH'
      then 1
    else 0
  end) as low_line_count
from orders
join lineitem on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
where l_shipmode in ('MAIL', 'SHIP')
  and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
  and l_shipdate < l_commitdate
  and l_receiptdate >= date '1994-01-01'
  and l_receiptdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year
group by l_shipmode
order by l_shipmode
queries.description: CASE expressions for shipping mode analysis

queries.name: TPC-H Q13: Customer Distribution
queries.sql:
SELECT
  c_count, COUNT(*) AS custdist
FROM (
  SELECT
    c_custkey,
    COUNT(o_orderkey) AS c_count
  FROM customer
  LEFT OUTER JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
    AND o_comment NOT LIKE '%special%requests%'
  GROUP BY c_custkey
) AS c_orders
GROUP BY c_count
ORDER BY custdist DESC, c_count DESC;
queries.wvlet:
from customer
left join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
  and o_comment not like '%special%requests%'
group by c_custkey
agg count(o_orderkey) as c_count
group by c_count
agg count(*) as custdist
order by custdist desc, c_count desc
queries.description: Customer order distribution (nested → pipeline)

queries.name: TPC-H Q14: Promotion Effect
queries.sql:
select 100.00 * sum(case
    when p_type like 'PROMO%'
      then l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)
    else 0
  end) / sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as promo_revenue
from lineitem
join part on l_partkey = p_partkey
where l_shipdate >= date '1995-09-01'
  and l_shipdate < date '1995-09-01' + interval '1' month
queries.description: CASE conditional aggregation for promo revenue %

queries.name: TPC-H Q15: Top Supplier
queries.sql:
with revenue0 as (
  select l_suppkey as supplier_no,
    sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as total_revenue
  from lineitem
  where l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01'
    and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '3' month
  group by l_suppkey
)
select s_suppkey, s_name, s_address, s_phone, total_revenue
from supplier
join revenue0 on s_suppkey = supplier_no
where total_revenue = (
  select max(total_revenue)
  from revenue0
)
order by s_suppkey
queries.description: CTE with max-revenue subquery

queries.name: TPC-H Q16: Parts/Supplier Relationship
queries.sql:
select p_brand, p_type, p_size, count(distinct ps_suppkey) as supplier_cnt
from partsupp
join part on p_partkey = ps_partkey
where p_brand <> 'Brand#45'
  and p_type not like 'MEDIUM POLISHED%'
  and p_size in (49, 14, 23, 45, 19, 3, 36, 9)
  and ps_suppkey not in (
    select s_suppkey
    from supplier
    where s_comment like '%Customer%Complaints%'
  )
group by p_brand, p_type, p_size
order by supplier_cnt desc, p_brand, p_type, p_size
queries.description: NOT IN subquery for supplier count by part attributes

queries.name: TPC-H Q17: Small-Quantity-Order Revenue
queries.sql:
select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly
from lineitem
join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
where p_brand = 'Brand#23'
  and p_container = 'MED BOX'
  and l_quantity < (
    select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity)
    from lineitem
    where l_partkey = p_partkey
  )
queries.description: Correlated subquery comparing quantity to average

queries.name: TPC-H Q18: Large Volume Customer
queries.sql:
select c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, sum(l_quantity)
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on o_orderkey = l_orderkey
where o_orderkey in (
    select l_orderkey
    from lineitem
    group by l_orderkey having sum(l_quantity) > 300
  )
group by c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice
order by o_totalprice desc, o_orderdate
limit 100
queries.description: IN subquery with HAVING for large orders

queries.name: TPC-H Q19: Discounted Revenue
queries.sql:
select sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
from lineitem
join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
where (
    p_brand = 'Brand#12'
    and p_container in ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG')
    and l_quantity >= 1 and l_quantity <= 1 + 10
    and p_size between 1 and 5
    and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
    and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
  )
  or (
    p_brand = 'Brand#23'
    and p_container in ('MED BAG', 'MED BOX', 'MED PKG', 'MED PACK')
    and l_quantity >= 10 and l_quantity <= 10 + 10
    and p_size between 1 and 10
    and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
    and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
  )
  or (
    p_brand = 'Brand#34'
    and p_container in ('LG CASE', 'LG BOX', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG')
    and l_quantity >= 20 and l_quantity <= 20 + 10
    and p_size between 1 and 15
    and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
    and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
  )
queries.description: Complex 3-way OR conditions on part/lineitem

queries.name: TPC-H Q20: Potential Part Promotion
queries.sql:
select s_name, s_address
from supplier
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where s_suppkey in (
    select ps_suppkey
    from partsupp
    where ps_partkey in (
        select p_partkey
        from part
        where p_name like 'forest%'
      )
      and ps_availqty > (
        select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity)
        from lineitem
        where l_partkey = ps_partkey
          and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
          and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01'
          and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year
      )
  )
  and n_name = 'CANADA'
order by s_name
queries.description: Nested IN + correlated subquery for supplier selection

queries.name: TPC-H Q21: Suppliers Who Kept Orders Waiting
queries.sql:
select s_name, count(*) as numwait
from supplier
join lineitem l1 on s_suppkey = l1.l_suppkey
join orders on o_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where o_orderstatus = 'F'
  and l1.l_receiptdate > l1.l_commitdate
  and exists (
    select *
    from lineitem l2
    where l2.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      and l2.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
  )
  and not exists (
    select *
    from lineitem l3
    where l3.l_orderkey = l1.l_orderkey
      and l3.l_suppkey <> l1.l_suppkey
      and l3.l_receiptdate > l3.l_commitdate
  )
  and n_name = 'SAUDI ARABIA'
group by s_name
order by numwait desc, s_name
limit 100
queries.description: EXISTS + NOT EXISTS with self-joins

queries.name: TPC-H Q22: Global Sales Opportunity
queries.sql:
select  cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(c_acctbal) as totacctbal
from    (
		select  substring(c_phone, 1, 2) as cntrycode,
			c_acctbal
		from    customer
		where   substring(c_phone, 1, 2) in
				('13', '31', '23', '29', '30', '18', '17')
			and c_acctbal > (
				select  avg(c_acctbal)
				from    customer
				where   c_acctbal > 0.00
					and substring(c_phone, 1, 2) in
						('13', '31', '23', '29', '30', '18', '17')
			)
			and not exists (
				select *
				from   orders
				where  o_custkey = c_custkey
			)
	) as custsale
group by
	cntrycode
order by
	cntrycode
queries.description: Nested subquery + NOT EXISTS for dormant customers

queries.name: Correlated Subquery
queries.sql:
SELECT o_orderkey, o_totalprice
FROM orders o
WHERE o_totalprice > (
  SELECT AVG(o2.o_totalprice)
  FROM orders o2
  WHERE o2.o_custkey = o.o_custkey
);
queries.wvlet:
from orders as o
where o_totalprice > (
  from orders as o2
  where o2.o_custkey = o.o_custkey
  agg avg(o2.o_totalprice)
)
queries.description: Correlated subquery with self-reference

queries.name: EXISTS Pattern
queries.sql:
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
WHERE n_name = 'CANADA'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partsupp
    WHERE ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
    AND ps_availqty > (
      SELECT 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity)
      FROM lineitem
      WHERE l_partkey = ps_partkey
        AND l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
        AND l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    )
  );
queries.wvlet:
from supplier
join nation on s_nationkey = n_nationkey
where n_name = 'CANADA'
where exists(
  from partsupp
  where ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  where ps_availqty > (
    from lineitem
    where l_partkey = ps_partkey
      and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
      and l_shipdate >= '1994-01-01'
      and l_shipdate < '1995-01-01'
    agg 0.5 * sum(l_quantity)
  )
)
queries.description: Nested EXISTS with deep subquery

queries.name: 5-Way Join
queries.sql:
SELECT
  c_name, o_orderdate, l_extendedprice, p_name, s_name
FROM customer
JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
JOIN lineitem ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN part ON p_partkey = l_partkey
JOIN supplier ON s_suppkey = l_suppkey
WHERE c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE'
  AND o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
ORDER BY l_extendedprice DESC
LIMIT 20;
queries.wvlet:
from customer
join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey
join lineitem on l_orderkey = o_orderkey
join part on p_partkey = l_partkey
join supplier on s_suppkey = l_suppkey
where c_mktsegment = 'AUTOMOBILE'
  and o_orderdate >= '1995-01-01'
select c_name, o_orderdate, l_extendedprice, p_name, s_name
order by l_extendedprice desc
limit 20
queries.description: Five-table join pattern

queries.name: Window Functions
queries.sql:
SELECT
  l_orderkey,
  l_extendedprice,
  SUM(l_extendedprice) OVER (PARTITION BY l_orderkey) AS order_total,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY l_orderkey ORDER BY l_extendedprice DESC) AS price_rank,
  l_extendedprice / SUM(l_extendedprice) OVER (PARTITION BY l_orderkey) AS price_pct
FROM lineitem
WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
ORDER BY l_orderkey, price_rank;
queries.wvlet:
from lineitem
where l_shipdate >= '1995-01-01'
select
  l_orderkey,
  l_extendedprice,
  sum(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey) as order_total,
  rank() over (partition by l_orderkey order by l_extendedprice desc) as price_rank,
  l_extendedprice / sum(l_extendedprice) over (partition by l_orderkey) as price_pct
order by l_orderkey, price_rank
queries.description: Window function analytics

queries.name: LLM: Redundant Subquery
queries.sql:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT
    c_custkey,
    c_name,
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE o_custkey = c_custkey
    ) AS order_count,
    (
      SELECT SUM(o_totalprice) FROM orders WHERE o_custkey = c_custkey
    ) AS total_spent
  FROM customer
) t
WHERE order_count > 0
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 10;
queries.wvlet:
from customer
left join orders on o_custkey = c_custkey
group by c_custkey, c_name
agg
  count(o_orderkey) as order_count,
  sum(o_totalprice) as total_spent
where order_count > 0
order by total_spent desc
limit 10
queries.description: LLM-generated with redundant correlated subqueries

queries.name: Flatten+DRY: Growth Customers
queries.sql:
SELECT c_name, c_acctbal, spend_96
FROM (
    (
        (
            customer
            JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
        )
        JOIN lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
    )
    JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey
)
WHERE n_name = 'JAPAN'
    AND o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
    AND o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY c_name, c_acctbal
HAVING SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) > (
    SELECT AVG(spend_95) FROM (
        SELECT c_custkey,
            SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS spend_95
        FROM (
            (
                (
                    customer
                    JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
                )
                JOIN lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
            )
            JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey
        )
        WHERE n_name = 'JAPAN'
            AND o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
            AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
        GROUP BY c_custkey
        HAVING SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) > (
            SELECT AVG(spend_94) FROM (
                SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS spend_94
                FROM (
                    (
                        (
                            customer
                            JOIN orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey
                        )
                        JOIN lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
                    )
                    JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey
                )
                WHERE n_name = 'JAPAN'
                    AND o_orderdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
                    AND o_orderdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
                GROUP BY c_custkey
            ) AS base_94
        )
    ) AS good_95
)
ORDER BY spend_96 DESC;
queries.description: Braced JOIN flatten + DRY: same join pattern x3 with different dates
